description: Copy fractures. Fractures falling in the specified range are copied from the DFN specified with the from-dfn keyword to the DFN specified with the to-dfn keyword. If the later DFN does not exist it is created.

keywords.name: from-dfn
keywords.description: Specify the DFN name from which to copy fractures. If no DFN is specified then fractures from all DFNs may be copied if they fall within the specified range.

keywords.name: to-dfn
keywords.description: Specify the DFN name to which fractures will be copied. If no DFN is specified then a new DFN is created name copyOfDfnXX , where XX is the ID of the DFN from which the fractures have been copied.

keywords.name: from-dfn
keywords.description: Specify the DFN name from which to copy fractures. If no DFN is specified then fractures from all DFNs may be copied if they fall within the specified range.

keywords.name: to-dfn
keywords.description: Specify the DFN name to which fractures will be copied. If no DFN is specified then a new DFN is created name copyOfDfnXX , where XX is the ID of the DFN from which the fractures have been copied.
